reasoning_model_1: The model successfully generated the audio with the required text "滚开，别挡我的路！". The voice is a deep male voice. The core requirement is to convey a "rude" (粗鲁) attitude. reasoning_model_2: The model correctly generated the audio content. The voice is a female voice. The audio aims to convey a "rude" attitude. The delivery is very fast-paced and sharp in tone. model_comparison: Both models are perfect in terms of content accuracy and fluency. The key distinction is in their interpretation and execution of the "rude" (粗鲁) attitude. Model 1 presents a deep, forceful, and commanding tone that feels very direct and powerful. This performance aligns closely with the common understanding of a gruff, coarse, and rude command. Model 2 expresses rudeness through a higher-pitched, sharp, and angry outburst. While this is also a valid interpretation of being rude, Model 1's delivery feels more impactful and better captures the specific nuance of "粗鲁" (coarse/gruff). The difference in the style and forcefulness of the emotional expression is significant, with Model 1 providing a more classic and powerful rendition of the requested attitude.
